steps.title: Name the volunteers' materials
steps.content: Volunteers share digitized excerpts from personal collections. Those shared materials help identify early uses of science-fiction terms and add them to the dictionary, so the blank should name useful items supplied to a project.

steps.title: Reject unrelated nouns
steps.content: A means reasons or defenses, not shared materials. C means decisions or solutions. D means discussions between parties, which does not describe the excerpts volunteers provide. The answer is B.
